author: Rakhmatillo Khonkhoshimov
name: Score-First TTT with LoRA on 11L EMA+GPTQ-lite
blurb: Score-first test-time training infrastructure with LoRA adapters on signalrush's 11L architecture. Demonstrates legal TTT approach: score token t before adapting on tokens <= t. FA2/SDPA fallback for non-FA3 environments.
